title: Invite Yourself

meta.description: g0v Summit is centered on “Information Transparency, Open Results, and Open Collaboration,” we use the power of the grassroots to care for public affairs. In 2026, #🪑InviteYourself to Taipei to weave the future of civic space.

info.title: Traffic Info
info.venueName: Academia Sinica Humanities and Social Sciences Building

transport.title: Transportation

step1.title: 1. To Nangang
step1.item1: Take TRA or HSR to Nangang Station.
step1.item2: Take Taipei MRT to Nangang Station (Blue Line) or Nangang Exhibition Center (Blue Line, Brown Line).

step2.title: 2. To Academia Sinica
step2.item1: Shuttle buses run between Nangang Station and Academia Sinica (North side) daily 7:50–9:30. Look for staff with signs; interval about 20 min.
step2.item2: At MRT Nangang Station (Exit 2), take bus 212, 270, or Blue 25 to Academia Sinica.
step2.item3: At Nangang Exhibition Center (Exit 5), take bus 212, 276, 306, 620, 645, 679, 205, S5, S1, or S12 to Academia Sinica.
step2.item4: Walk or ride YouBike to Academia Sinica Humanities and Social Sciences Building.

transport.drivingPlaceholder: Driving / motorcycle directions to be added.
